mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document (announce_id, title, description, created_at) VALUES (#{announceId}, #{title}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT d.document_id AS documentId, d.announce_id AS announceId, d.title, d.description, IF(mdc.status = 1, TRUE, FALSE) AS checked FROM member_favorite mf JOIN document d ON mf.announce_id = d.announce_id LEFT JOIN member_document_check mdc ON d.document_id = mdc.document_id AND mdc.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE mf.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY d.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_document_check (document_id, member_id, status, checked_at, created_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{memberId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), checked_at = NOW()
